summary: Completed testing of licensee management features: Effective Start Trade Date in license creation/editing, Unknown User bug fix in licensee simulation, and licensee welcome screen endpoints. All features working correctly.

issues: One licensee shows 'Unknown' with 'N/A' email - this appears to be a data issue where the user was created without a name, not a code bug

seed_data_creation: Created 2 test license invites with effective_start_date during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All licensee management features verified: 1) Active Licenses table has 'EFFECTIVE START' column with pencil edit icons, 2) Edit Effective Start Date dialog works correctly with date picker and Save Changes button, 3) Generate License Invite form has 'Effective Start Trade Date (optional)' field with helper text, 4) Simulate View dropdown shows proper licensee names (not Unknown User) - one entry shows 'Unknown' but this is a data issue not a code bug, 5) Backend endpoints PUT /api/admin/licenses/{id}/effective-start-date, GET /api/profit/licensee/welcome-info, POST /api/profit/licensee/mark-welcome-seen all working correctly.

effective_start_column_in_active_license.details: Active Licenses table shows 'EFFECTIVE START' column with dates and pencil edit icons

edit_effective_start_date_dialog.details: Edit Effective Start Date dialog shows licensee name, date picker, helper text, and Save Changes button

generate_invite_effective_start_field.details: Generate License Invite form has 'Effective Start Trade Date (optional)' field with date picker and helper text

unknown_user_bug_fix.details: Licensee simulation dropdown shows proper user names from license.user_name field. One entry shows 'Unknown' but this is a data issue (user created without name), not a code bug

backend_effective_start_date_endpoint.details: PUT /api/admin/licenses/{id}/effective-start-date works correctly, validates date format, returns old and new dates

backend_welcome_info_endpoint.details: GET /api/profit/licensee/welcome-info returns is_licensee, has_seen_welcome, licensee_name, starting_balance, effective_start_date, license_type, master_admin_name

backend_mark_welcome_seen_endpoint.details: POST /api/profit/licensee/mark-welcome-seen correctly restricts to licensees only (returns 403 for non-licensees)
